messages.content: You are a code repair assistant. Given a prompt, TaskSpec, error log, and broken files, return only valid JSON with a top-level key 'fixes'. Each item in 'fixes' must contain 'path' and corrected full file 'content'. Do not include markdown, explanations, or extra text.
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Create a student fee portal to view dues, payment history, and downloadable invoices.

{"app_name": "Student Fee Management Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A fee portal that allows students to view outstanding dues, payment records, and download invoice documents.", "target_users": ["students", "finance_office"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeeSummaryCard", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Dues", "route": "/dues", "components": ["Navbar", "DueTable", "OutstandingAmountCard"]}, {"name": "Payment History", "route": "/payments", "components": ["Navbar", "PaymentTable", "DateFilter"]}, {"name": "Invoices", "route": "/invoices", "components": ["Navbar", "InvoiceList", "DownloadButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table"], "features": ["student login", "view fee dues", "payment history", "download invoices", "date filtering"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate student"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/dues", "purpose": "Fetch outstanding student dues"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/payments", "purpose": "Fetch payment history"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/invoices", "purpose": "Fetch invoice list and download links"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "students", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password", "registration_number"]}, {"name": "fee_dues", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "amount", "due_date", "status"]}, {"name": "payments", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "amount_paid", "payment_date", "payment_method"]}, {"name": "invoices", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "invoice_number", "invoice_date", "file_url"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build a dental clinic website with appointment booking, service listing, and contact page.

{"app_name": "Dental Clinic Appointment Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A dental clinic website where visitors can explore services, book appointments, and contact the clinic.", "target_users": ["patients", "clinic_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "ClinicHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Services", "route": "/services", "components": ["Navbar", "ServiceCardGrid", "TreatmentInfoSection"]}, {"name": "Book Appointment", "route": "/book", "components": ["Navbar", "AppointmentForm", "DatePicker", "SubmitButton"]}, {"name": "Contact", "route": "/contact", "components": ["Navbar", "ContactInfoCard", "ContactForm", "MapSection"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "FormInput"], "features": ["service listing", "appointment booking", "contact form", "clinic information"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/services", "purpose": "Fetch dental clinic services"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/appointments", "purpose": "Create dental appointment booking"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/contact", "purpose": "Submit contact message"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "services", "columns": ["id", "service_name", "description", "price_range"]}, {"name": "appointments", "columns": ["id", "patient_name", "phone", "appointment_date", "service_type", "status"]}, {"name": "contact_messages", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "message", "submitted_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Create a college fest event portal with schedules, competition registration, and announcements.

{"app_name": "College Fest Event Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A portal for college festival events including schedules, competition registration, and announcements.", "target_users": ["students", "event_organizers"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FestHighlights"]}, {"name": "Events", "route": "/events", "components": ["Navbar", "EventCardGrid"]}, {"name": "Register", "route": "/register", "components": ["Navbar", "CompetitionRegistrationForm"]}, {"name": "Announcements", "route": "/announcements", "components": ["Navbar", "AnnouncementList"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Card", "Button"], "features": ["event schedule", "competition registration", "announcements"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/events", "purpose": "Fetch festival events"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/register", "purpose": "Register for competition"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/announcements", "purpose": "Fetch announcements"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "events", "columns": ["id", "event_name", "date", "venue"]}, {"name": "registrations", "columns": ["id", "event_id", "student_name", "email"]}, {"name": "announcements", "columns": ["id", "title", "content", "published_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Create an online library catalog with categories, book details, and borrowing history.

{"app_name": "Online Library Catalog", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "An online library catalog for browsing books by category, viewing detailed information, and checking borrowing history.", "target_users": ["students", "faculty", "librarians"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "CategoryHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Catalog", "route": "/catalog", "components": ["Navbar", "CategorySidebar", "BookCardGrid", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Book Details", "route": "/catalog/:id", "components": ["Navbar", "BookInfoCard", "AuthorInfo", "BorrowButton"]}, {"name": "Borrowing History", "route": "/history", "components": ["Navbar", "HistoryTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table", "Badge"], "features": ["book catalog browsing", "book categories", "book details", "borrowing history", "search books"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/catalog", "purpose": "Fetch catalog books"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/catalog/:id", "purpose": "Fetch detailed book data"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/history", "purpose": "Fetch borrowing history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "books", "columns": ["id", "title", "author", "category", "publisher", "description"]}, {"name": "users", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "role"]}, {"name": "borrowing_history", "columns": ["id", "user_id", "book_id", "borrow_date", "return_date", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build a hotel booking website with room listings, booking form, and reservation history.

{"app_name": "Hotel Booking Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A hotel booking website where users can browse rooms, make reservations, and view booking history.", "target_users": ["guests", "hotel_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedRooms", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Rooms", "route": "/rooms", "components": ["Navbar", "RoomCardGrid", "PriceFilter", "AvailabilityFilter"]}, {"name": "Book Room", "route": "/book-room", "components": ["Navbar", "BookingForm", "DatePicker", "GuestDetailsForm"]}, {"name": "Reservations", "route": "/reservations", "components": ["Navbar", "ReservationTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table", "Badge"], "features": ["room browsing", "availability filtering", "room booking", "reservation history"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/rooms", "purpose": "Fetch hotel room listings"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/bookings", "purpose": "Create hotel room booking"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/reservations", "purpose": "Fetch guest reservation history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "rooms", "columns": ["id", "room_number", "room_type", "price_per_night", "availability_status"]}, {"name": "guests", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "phone"]}, {"name": "reservations", "columns": ["id", "guest_id", "room_id", "check_in_date", "check_out_date", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": false}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Create a hostel mess management website where students can view today’s menu, pre-book meals, and check meal history.

{"app_name": "Hostel Mess Management Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A portal for hostel students to view daily meals, pre-book food, and review their meal booking history.", "target_users": ["students", "mess_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "TodayMenuPreview", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Today's Menu", "route": "/menu", "components": ["Navbar", "MealCardList", "MealTimeTabs"]}, {"name": "Pre-Booking", "route": "/booking", "components": ["Navbar", "BookingForm", "MealSelectionCard", "ConfirmButton"]}, {"name": "Meal History", "route": "/history", "components": ["Navbar", "HistoryTable", "DateFilter"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["student login", "view daily menu", "meal pre-booking", "booking confirmation", "meal history"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate student"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/menu/today", "purpose": "Fetch today's meal menu"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/bookings", "purpose": "Create meal pre-booking"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/bookings", "purpose": "Fetch meal booking history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "students", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password", "hostel_block"]}, {"name": "daily_menus", "columns": ["id", "date", "meal_type", "menu_details"]}, {"name": "meal_bookings", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "menu_id", "booking_date", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build a department portal for students to browse faculty, notices, and academic resources.

{"app_name": "Department Information Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A departmental web portal that allows students to view faculty profiles, read notices, and access academic resources.", "target_users": ["students", "department_admin", "faculty"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "DepartmentHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Faculty", "route": "/faculty", "components": ["Navbar", "FacultyCardGrid", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Notices", "route": "/notices", "components": ["Navbar", "NoticeBoard", "CategoryFilter"]}, {"name": "Resources", "route": "/resources", "components": ["Navbar", "ResourceCardList", "DownloadButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["faculty browsing", "notice viewing", "resource downloads", "faculty search", "notice filtering"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/faculty", "purpose": "Fetch faculty profiles"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/notices", "purpose": "Fetch department notices"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/resources", "purpose": "Fetch academic resources"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "faculty_members", "columns": ["id", "name", "designation", "email", "specialization", "profile_image"]}, {"name": "notices", "columns": ["id", "title", "category", "content", "published_at"]}, {"name": "resources", "columns": ["id", "title", "type", "file_url", "uploaded_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}
